{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Kerani
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Dreadgod (novel)|Dreadgod]]
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Kerani]] is a worker who uses goggles and tools to maintain engines.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
